title: fix: handle division by zero
diff:
diff --git a/calculator.py b/calculator.py
index ...
-    return a / b
+    if b == 0:
+        return "Error: Division by zero"
+    return a / b

files.patch:
@@ -5,1 +5,4 @@
-    return a / b
+    if b == 0:
+        return "Error: Division by zero"
+    return a / b
